noidung:
RewriteEngine On
ErrorDocument 400 /404.php
ErrorDocument 401 /404.php
ErrorDocument 403 /404.php
ErrorDocument 404 /404.php
ErrorDocument 500 /404.php

RewriteBase /

RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f
RewriteCond %{HTTP_HOST} ^www.vienphuongnam.com.vn [NC]
RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://vienphuongnam.com.vn/$1 [L,R=301]
RewriteRule ^(.*)/$ /index.php?duongdan=$1
RewriteRule ^$ /cnv/ [L]
